description_long: This jewelry piece is a striking, multi-faceted cluster of crystalline structures radiating outward from a central core. The crystals vary in size and color, with prominent green, yellow, blue, and purple hues, giving the object a vibrant and eye-catching appearance. The surfaces of the crystals are sharply angular and highly reflective, suggesting a composition of cut gemstones or colored glass. The central core appears to be a rougher, darker material, possibly mimicking a mineral matrix from which the crystals emerge. The overall form is asymmetrical, with some crystals extending further than others, creating a dynamic and organic silhouette. The intricate arrangement and vivid coloration make this piece a bold statement accessory, likely intended as a pendant or brooch.
description: A vibrant, multi-colored cluster of angular crystals radiates from a dark central core, forming an elaborate and eye-catching jewelry piece. The design features sharp, reflective surfaces in green, yellow, blue, and purple.
description_view_0: This view highlights the prominent green and yellow crystals, with the purple core partially visible and the overall cluster appearing dense and layered.
description_view_1: From this angle, the green crystals dominate, with the purple and yellow sections receding, and the spiky, radiating structure is most pronounced.
description_view_2: The blue and green crystals are most visible here, with the yellow section less prominent and the central core mostly obscured.
description_view_3: This view showcases the yellow and green crystals in the foreground, with the blue section visible to the left and the purple core at the center.
